description: Git and version control hosting platforms, including code review, issue tracking, and CI integration.

entries.name: GitHub
entries.summary: The largest Git hosting platform with issues, project boards, Actions CI/CD, and package registry built in.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited public and private repositories, unlimited collaborators on free plan, 2,000 CI/CD Actions minutes/month, 500MB Packages storage.
entries.notes: Private repo collaborator limits were removed in 2019; free tier is generous for small teams.

entries.name: GitLab
entries.summary: Git hosting with an integrated DevOps platform: CI/CD, container registry, security scanning, and Kubernetes integration.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited private repos, 5 users per top-level namespace free, 400 CI/CD minutes/month, 5GB storage, 10GB transfer.
entries.notes: Also distributed as free open-source self-managed Community Edition.

entries.name: Bitbucket
entries.summary: Atlassian's Git hosting product, tightly integrated with Jira and Trello, with built-in Pipelines CI/CD.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited private repos for up to 5 users, 50 build minutes/month on Pipelines.

entries.name: SourceHut
entries.summary: Minimalist, hackable software forge: Git/Mercurial hosting, mailing lists, CI, and issue tracking, all email-driven and ad-free.
entries.freeTier: Pay-what-you-want; free tier available, fully open source and self-hostable.

entries.name: Codeberg
entries.summary: Non-profit, community-run Git hosting built on Forgejo (a Gitea fork), as a privacy-respecting GitHub alternative.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited public and private repos, free for individuals and small projects, donation-funded.

entries.name: Gitea (Cloud / Self-host)
entries.summary: Lightweight, self-hostable Git service; Gitea Cloud offers managed hosting on top of the open-source core.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted is fully free and open source; Gitea Cloud has a free tier for small repos.

entries.name: Launchpad
entries.summary: Canonical's collaboration platform for Bazaar/Git hosting, bug tracking, and Ubuntu/PPA package building.
entries.freeTier: Free for open-source projects, including PPA package builds.

entries.name: SourceForge
entries.summary: Long-running open-source project hosting with file release distribution, forums, and Git/SVN/Mercurial support.
entries.freeTier: Free hosting and unlimited bandwidth for open-source projects.

entries.name: jitpack.io
entries.summary: Turns any GitHub repository into a Maven dependency without needing to publish to a separate repository.
entries.freeTier: Free for public projects, unlimited builds.

entries.name: Gemfury
entries.summary: Private and public artifact/package repository supporting Maven, PyPI, npm, Go modules, NuGet, APT, and RPM.
entries.paidFrom: Starter plans from ~$7/month for private packages.
